requests.prompt: Use reference image 1 as the real product identity lock for the Burberry Long Silk Cotton Foxfield Trench Coat; preserve its long oatmeal-beige shape, colors, silk‑cotton faille material, labels, and visible marks. Create a realistic commercial full-scene start frame that fills the canvas edge to edge—no inner frame, borders, insets, pasted image, or margins. Minimal editorial studio runway: warm cream cyclorama backdrop and matching matte cream runway floor, clean and audience-free, no set dressing or props. Soft warm lighting with gentle frontal key and subtle rim defining the coat’s outline. Show a poised adult model already wearing the same coat, fully belted, centered in elegant three‑quarter stance, arms relaxed at sides; product clearly visible at plausible scale and orientation. No product-only packshot. No text, UI, posters, extra logos, or watermarks.
requests.negative_prompt: No captions, subtitles, watermark, UI, fake logo, random letters, extra fingers, warped hands, blurry product, wrong product, product-only packshot, empty background, inner frame, border, poster, inset image, image inside an image, black margins, dark outer margins, central vertical rectangle, photo within a photo, matted print.
